parameters.query: INSERT INTO saos_clients (stripe_subscription_id, stripe_customer_id, customer_email, customer_name, tier, deployment_type, vps_status) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, 'pending') ON CONFLICT (stripe_subscription_id) DO UPDATE SET customer_email = EXCLUDED.customer_email, customer_name = EXCLUDED.customer_name RETURNING id;
INSERT INTO task_queue (task_type, payload_json, assigned_agent, priority, max_retries) VALUES ($1, $2, 'ASSEMBLY', 9, 5) RETURNING id;
